items.title: 'Never too late': Billie Jean King, 82, graduates

items.title: Pep Guardiola likely to leave Manchester City after current season, ending trophy-laden decade

items.title: Rapidly evolving Kishan 'an amazing asset to have' for SRH
items.summary: Ishan Kishan and Heinrich Klaasen, not for the first time this season, played key roles for SRH with the bat when the celebrated Travishek at the top couldn't get going
